spec_match.rationale: Flawless event loop ordering visualization tracking native mousedown, mouseup, selectionchange, and click timings accurately.

interactive.rationale: Provides drag-selectable text box rendering multi-column chronological visual logging grid.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the Event Sequence Visualizer description.

edge_cases.rationale: Excellent version detection warnings dynamically guiding users on what to look for depending on their Chrome version.

references.rationale: Violates repository hard rule: does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5298387739082752.

design_system.rationale: Vibrant but clean retro colored grid highlighting rows appropriately matching style specifications.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link (hard rule violation)
openQuestions.detail: The page does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5298387739082752, which violates the repository hard rule that every concept page must include a ChromeStatus link.
